headline: Employers must address ‘fear of becoming obsolete’ as AI reshapes the workplace
summary: New insights show how a stronger employee experience can turn anxiety into confidenceNEW YORK, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Employers face a growing challenge as artificial intelligence (AI) reshapes how work is done, with new research from WTW highlighting a rise in the ‘fear of becoming obsolete’ among employees. WTW’s 2026 Employee Experience (EX) Global Market Study points to a widening gap between the pace of technological change and employee readiness. While AI adoption is acceleratin
